title: Green Block Selection Outline
description: This texture pack uses core shaders to make the block selection outline Green.
body:
**Disclaimer: This texture pack takes advantage of core shaders, and it is not possible to port it to 1.18. Please do not ask me for it. If you want a different block selection outline, then update your game.**

This texture pack changes the colour of the outline that appears when you select a block.

**Disclaimer 2: The outline is not as thick as it is in the icon. It was made thicker in the outline to be more visible, refer to the gallery to check how thick it actually is.**

All Other Colours:

[Blue Block Selection Outline](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blue-block-outline)

[Green Block Selection Outline](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/green-block-selection-outline)

[Purple Block Selection Outline](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/purple-block-selection-outline)

[Rainbow Block Selection Outline](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rainbow-block-selection-outline)

[White Block Selection Outline](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/white-block-selection-outline)

[Red Block Selection Outline](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/red-block-selection-outline)
